global_summary: All nine jobs are behind or on warning, with 29 of 174 tasks closed company-wide. Ginger Brown and Clifford Clack are the sharpest slips at 86% and 64%; Katie Holmes and Rohini are nearly on pace. Focus next on foundation, rough-ins and trim deadlines landing Sun Jul 12 through mid-week.

22NxUEJKTj6C.name: Ginger Brown
22NxUEJKTj6C.text: Fireplace and doors fixed, but only 3 of 21 expected work-days done — Slip: 86%. Painting now slated for Sat Jul 18.

22PCPuWPndkt.name: Clifford Clack — Gym Addition
22PCPuWPndkt.text: Secret door built, but only 3 of 12 expected work-days done — Slip: 64%; bricks stalled on cashflow. Brick installation now due Sat Jul 11.

22PMwhcSuqJD.name: Karim-Merchant
22PMwhcSuqJD.text: Foundation dug and in-ground plumbing in, with 11 of 16 expected work-days done — Slip: 15%. Place form board now targeted Mon Jul 13.

22PK9BhEJtZn.name: Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458)
22PK9BhEJtZn.text: Slip: 11% of the month plan (14.0 of 21.0 expected work-days done; 3/29 tasks). Key move: TILES: INSTALL TILES (Fri Jul 10 → Sat Jul 18, +8d).

22Nx8Uut2Qxs.name: Kyle Aubry - Project 01
22Nx8Uut2Qxs.text: No tasks closed this week; 10 of 19 expected work-days done — Slip: 19% after a botched paint texture. Window shutters now set for Fri Jul 17.

22PGVNmUgLww.name: Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199)
22PGVNmUgLww.text: Slip: 12% of the month plan (49.0 of 61.0 expected work-days done; 6/23 tasks). Key move: FRAMING: EXECUTE (Sat Jul 4 → Tue Aug 4, +31d).

22PL9RSbYNs9.name: Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496)
22PL9RSbYNs9.text: Exterior sheathing done, 13 of 16 expected work-days in — Slip: 5%. Roof decking due Sun Jul 12.

22P2cmNJZcwJ.name: Stephanie and Marc Felton
22P2cmNJZcwJ.text: Slip: 17% of the month plan (24.0 of 33.0 expected work-days done; 5/20 tasks). Key move: CABINET: INSTALLATION OF DOORS (Mon Jul 6 → Mon Jul 13, +7d).

22P2j3sQMKqz.name: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs
22P2j3sQMKqz.text: Sheetrock hung and this week's 3 tasks all closed, 8 of 10 expected work-days in — Slip: 5%. Tape, bed and texture next, Thu Jul 16.
